task:
Build this app in Clear:

**User Profiles** (Level 5)

Build a user registration/login system with profiles. POST /api/register (email, password, name). POST /api/login returns token. GET /api/me returns current user profile (requires auth). PUT /api/me updates profile name.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  name, required

# Your endpoints here

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/
final_source:
build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  name, required

# Register endpoint
when user sends new_user to /api/register:
  validate new_user:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
    name is text, required
  
  user = save new_user to Users
  send back user with status 201

# Login endpoint
when user sends credentials to /api/login:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
  
  email_val = credentials's email
  password_val = credentials's password
  
  users = get all Users where email is email_val
  
  if length of users is greater than 0:
    found_user = first item of users
    stored_password = found_user's password
    if stored_password is password_val:
      token = ('token_' + found_user's id)
      response = { token is token }
      send back response with status 200
    else:
      send back 'Invalid credentials' with status 401
  else:
    send back 'Invalid credentials' with status 401

# Get current user profile (requires auth)
when user calls GET /api/me:
  auth_header = get header 'Authorization'
  has_auth = auth_header is not ''
  
  if has_auth is false:
    send back 'Unauthorized' with status 401
  else:
    users = get all Users
    if length of users is greater than 0:
      user = first item of users
      send back user with status 200
    else:
      send back 'User not found' with status 401

# Update profile name
when user updates profile at /api/me:
  requires login
  auth_header = get header 'Authorization'
  has_auth = auth_header is not ''
  
  if has_auth is false:
    send back 'Unauthorized' with status 401
  else:
    users = get all Users
    if length of users is greater than 0:
      user = first item of users
      user's name is profile's name
      saved = save user to Users
      send back saved with status 200
    else:
      send back 'User not found' with status 401
